---
title: Gospel of John Index
listing:
  contents: posts/john/**/*.qmd 
  date-format: ddd, MMMM DD, YYYY
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false 
---

---
